quality_notes: Add vulnerability: mention a mistake, failure, or lesson learned. Try 'I was wrong', 'took me years to learn', or 'finally understood'.
Add more relevant emojis to improve scanability and engagement (target: 4 to 10).
Replace poll options with concrete architecture choices, not section header names.
Include one fenced visual block that matches the planned diagram type.
Keep the post in the LinkedIn sweet spot: roughly 140 to 340 words.
Poll options are too generic; use concrete answer choices.

post_text:
📌 AI Agent Interaction

A few years ago, I worked on a multi-agent system project where agent communication was a black box. I clicked on an obscure log message last week. The signal-to-noise ratio in agent communication was abysmally low, with most messages being redundant or irrelevant. This made it extremely difficult to debug issues, as the meaningful messages were lost in the noise.

Three key issues stood out: lack of clear message formatting, insufficient logging, and inadequate filtering.
1. Implement clear message headers

3. Filter out redundant messages

#Action Steps
This experience changed my approach to designing agent communication systems, emphasizing the importance of a high signal-to-noise ratio.

💬 What strategies do you use to improve signal-to-noise ratio in multi-agent systems #MultiAgentSystems #AgentCommunication #SignalToNoiseRatio #Debugging #SystemDesign
